parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are a competitive intelligence analyst. Extract structured information from this web page HTML. Return JSON with: company_name, page_type (pricing/features/product/integrations), key_features (array), pricing_model (if available), integrations (array), market_positioning (string), last_updated_hint (if visible). Remove all HTML markup and focus on substantive content.

parameters.name: records
parameters.value: ={{ (function(){ const chunks = $input.all(); const records = []; for (const chunk of chunks) { records.push({ _id: chunk.json.id, text: chunk.json.text, competitor_name: chunk.json.competitor_name, doc_type: chunk.json.page_type, source_url: chunk.json.source_url, scraped_date: chunk.json.scraped_date }); } return records; })() }}
